# Risk Lanes

## Routine

Localized UI or documentation changes with no contract impact.
Gates: targeted tests, lint, typecheck.

## Standard

Feature behavior, dependency, API adapter, storage, routing, native plugin, or package owner
changes. Gates: routine + coverage, architecture, ownership, build.

## Critical

Authentication, token handling, permissions, deep links, secure storage, native release,
destructive migration, secrets, privacy, or security policy.
Gates: standard + integration/contract suites, security:audit, security:secrets, E2E.

Context breadth and validation expand with risk.
